reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content: 비싸서 고민했는데 생각보다 크고 수납도 많고 똥 봉지 넣는 부분이 있어서 마음에 들어요
reviews.content_en: I was hesitant because of the price, but it's bigger than I thought and has lots of storage space. I especially love that there's a dedicated spot for poop bags!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
진짜 산책 가방으로 너무 좋아요!
어떤 광고 보고 사려고 벼르고 있다가 가격대가 좀 있어서 고민중이었는데 바잇미에서는 3만원대라서 바로! 구매했습니다ㅎㅎ

사진처럼 풉백 넣는 곳이 진짜 편리해요 저렇게 조금 빼놓으면 길에서 싸도 바로바로 치워줄 수 있어요ㅎㅎ 예전에 들고다닌 가방은 너무 작아서 찾는데도 오래걸리고 그렇다고 리드줄에 달고 다니기엔 너무 흔들려서 불편하더라구요ㅠㅠ 진짜 강추!

그리구 물병 넣는 포켓이 있어서 편하게 넣었다 뺐다 할 수 있고, 저는 항상 텀블러에 물 넣고 제가 먹기도 하고 저희집 강쥐는 바잇미에서 파는 실리콘 컵에 따라서 주기도 한답니다ㅎㅎ

가로 부분에 있는 긴 포켓엔 물티슈 항상 넣고 다녀요! 이렇게 다 세션이 나눠져 있어서 산책의 질이 너무 향상되었어요 너무 좋아요~

고민하도 계신다면 강추-!
reviews.content_en:
It's seriously amazing as a walk bag! 😍
I was eyeing it after seeing an ad, but was worried about the price point. Then I saw BITE ME had it for around 30,000 won, so I bought it right away! ㅎㅎ

The poop bag pocket is super convenient just like in the photos! I can pull out a little bit and clean up right away if my pup goes during the walk ㅎㅎ My old bag was too small and took forever to find things in, and tying it to the leash made it swing around too much and was annoying ㅠㅠ Seriously highly recommend!

Also, there's a water bottle pocket so I can easily put it in and take it out. I always carry water in my tumbler for myself, and I also pour water into the silicone cup from BITE ME for my pup ㅎㅎ

I keep wet wipes in the long pocket on the side! With all these separate compartments, my walks have gotten SO much better. I love it so much~

If you're still thinking about it, definitely recommend it!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 산책가방을 찾다가 사이즈도 적당하고 안에 텀블러 넣는곳도 있어서 바로 주문했는데 너무 맘에 들어요. 아이를 안고 크로스로 할수있어서 너무 편해요..
reviews.content_en: I was looking for a walk bag, found one with a decent size and a spot for a tumbler, so I ordered it right away. I'm so happy with it! It's so convenient being able to carry my baby and wear it crossbody...

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
이전 나일론  산책가방 버전을 너무 잘 쓰고 있어서 거의 처음에 나왔던 면 버전 산책가방을 또 구매했어요. 면 버전도 너무 마음이 들지만 저는 개인적으로 이전 나일론 가방이 최고예요. 
지금은 다른 버전의 나일론 가방이 판매 중이고 이전 버전은 단종된 것 같아요. 
예전 나일론 가방 검정색을 더 하나 사 둘 껄 그랬어요. 이전 버전 나일론 산책가방 또 만들어 주세요오~~
reviews.content_en:
I was using the previous nylon version of the walk bag so well that I bought the cotton version from when it first came out. The cotton version is great too, but personally, the previous nylon bag is the best for me.
Now they're selling a different version of the nylon bag and the old version seems to be discontinued.
I wish I'd bought another black nylon bag while I had the chance. Please bring back the previous version of the nylon walk bag~~

reviews.name: 온****
reviews.content:
텀블러 고정칸이 있어 좋아요
수납 좋고 탄탄하게 각잡혀서 편하게 쓰기 좋아요
푸백 뽑아쓰는 옆주머니 특히 굿!!!
금새 때가 타버려서 맴찟
reviews.content_en:
I love that there's a designated tumbler slot
Great storage and it's structured nicely and sturdily, so it's convenient to use
The side pocket for pulling out poop bags is especially great!!!
It gets stained pretty quickly though, which is a bit of a downside

reviews.name: 지****
reviews.content: 항상 산책할때 보부상같이 들고 다니는 스타일이라 가방이 필요했는데 배변봉투 홀이 옆에 있는것듀 너무 맘에 들고 생각보다 아주 많이 들어가서 그냥 제가 들고 다니기도 합니다!  크로스백으로 되어있어서 너무 좋구여! 빨았다가 쓰는데도 떼도 잘 빠지고 굳!
reviews.content_en: I always carry around stuff like a peddler when I'm out for walks, so I needed a bag. I really love that the poop bag hole is on the side and it holds way more than I expected, so I even use it for my own stuff! It's a crossbody, which is super convenient! After washing, the stains come off well, and it works great!

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content:
너무 잘 구매한 산책가방이에요. 가방사이즈가 넉넉해서 산책에 필요한 물품은 다 넣을 수 있어요. 남자여자 가릴 것 없이 심플하게 잘 어울려요. 풉백 역할도 되어서 너무 편해요! 
요즘은 산책가방 중에 바잇미 데일리가방만 주구장창 들고있어요
reviews.content_en:
It's such a great walk bag purchase. The size is spacious so I can fit everything I need for walks. It has a simple style that works for both men and women. It doubles as a poop bag holder too, which is super convenient!
These days I'm always carrying BITE ME's Daily Bag as my walk bag

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 그동안 토트스타일 산책가방만 썼는데 투웨이백이라서 편할 것 같아요. 가방 크기도 넉넉하고 주머니도 있어서 편리하게 사용할 것 같아요. 색상도 진한 네이비라 예뻐요.
reviews.content_en: I used to only use tote-style walk bags, but this two-way bag seems convenient. The bag is spacious with pockets too, so it should be practical to use. The dark navy color is pretty too.

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 산책가방 그냥 평소 데일리 가방으로 사용해도 될만큼 활용성도 좋고 옷이랑 잘어울려요!! 산책가방으로도 너무 잘 쓰고 있어요 특히 옆에 똥주 뽑을 수 있는 구멍이 되게 편리했어요👍 그리고 댕댕이 안고가다가 힘들면 가방이 크지도 않고 딱 중간이라서 가방안에 짐없으면 넣어가거나 가방위에 엉덩이 올려서 가면 편하구 좋았어요 그리고 헤잇미는 옷이나 등쪽에 뿌려서 산책나가요
reviews.content_en: I use the walk bag as my everyday daily bag all the time since it's so versatile and goes well with outfits!! I'm using it great as a walk bag too. Especially that hole on the side for pulling out poop bags is really convenient! 👍 And when I'm carrying my pup and get tired, the bag isn't too big and is just the right size—if there's no stuff in it I can put him in, or he can rest his butt on top of the bag which works great! And I use HAT ME on my clothes or back when I go for walks

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 휘뚜루 마뚜루 들고 다니기에 좋아요. 흰색 네이비 다 샀는데, 네이비 면이 좀 더 약해요. 주머니도 많고 메기 편해요. 가볍구요
reviews.content_en: It's great for carrying all kinds of stuff around. I bought both white and navy, and the navy canvas is a bit weaker. Lots of pockets and easy to carry. It's light too

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 전에쓰던가방이 작은것같아서 좀더큰사이즈 알아보다가 구입했어요! 많이 들어가기도하고 똥츄구멍따로있어서좋고 무엇보다 심플하니 넘예뻐요 잘쓸게요!!
reviews.content_en: My old bag seemed too small, so I looked for a bigger size and bought this! It holds a lot of stuff, has a separate poop bag hole which is great, and most of all it's simple and so pretty! I'll use it well!!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
맨날 한손엔 조그만 산책가방 다른 한손엔 리드줄,
이제품 사용하고나서 손에 자유가 생기니 너무 편하고 산책도 즐겁네요 ㅎṑṑṑ 생각보다 사이즈도 넉넉해서 
많이 들어가요!!!! 추천합니다
reviews.content_en:
I used to always carry a small walk bag in one hand and a leash in the other,
Since using this product my hands are free and it's so convenient—walks are actually enjoyable now too ㅎṑṑṑ The size is more spacious than I expected so
it holds so much!!!! Highly recommend

reviews.name: 여****
reviews.content: 정말 편하고 실용적이네요~~일단 많이 들어간다는거!!!
reviews.content_en: It's really convenient and practical~~First of all, it holds a lot!!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 싸이즈 넉넉하구요ㅡ 칸칸 실용적이게 나눠져 있구요ㅡ강아지 2kg 좀 넘는데 잠시 가방으로 쏘옥 ㅋ̄̈ㅋ꙼̈ㅋ̆̎ㅋ̐̈ㅋ̊̈ 추천 드립니다^^
reviews.content_en: The size is spacious, it's divided into practical compartments, and my pup is just over 2kg but fits right into the bag ㅋ̄̈ㅋ꙼̈ㅋ̆̎ㅋ̐̈ㅋ̊̈ I recommend it ^^

reviews.name: 처****
reviews.content: 가벼운 편인데다 수납공간이 넉넉해서 바리바리바리스타인 산책러에게 딱입니다
reviews.content_en: It's light and has plenty of storage space—perfect for someone like me who loves to pack everything for walks

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 생각보다 안크네요 사이즈 적당해서 좋아요 실물이 훨씬 이쁘네용
reviews.content_en: It's smaller than I expected but the size is just right, so I like it. The actual product looks much prettier than the photos!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 만족 만족 우선 우리엄마가 뭐 이런 가방이 다 있냐면서 깔깔 거리면서 웃으셨어요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 세상 좋아졌다며, 탐난다고 하셨어요 우선 배변봉투를 넣을 수 있어서 너무 좋아요. 풉백이 은근 귀찮았는데 가방에 넣으면 편하고 물론 자꾸 길게 튀어나와서 조금 부끄러울때가 있지만 당당한 애견인이니까여! 수납도 좋아서 구석 구석 넣기 좋아요. 빗도 가지고 다니고 내 짐도 들고 다닐수 있어 좋아요. 여기저기 다 잘 어울리는 컬러라서 좋습니다 산책이나 놀이터 갈 때 들고 다닐 가방이 필요했는데 딱 좋아요.
reviews.content_en: So satisfied! First, my mom laughed and was like "what kind of bag is this?" ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ saying the world has gotten so convenient and that she wants one! First of all, I love being able to store poop bags in it. Poop bags were kind of annoying to carry around, but now it's convenient to just put them in the bag. Of course they stick out a bit long sometimes which is slightly embarrassing, but I'm a proud dog owner so! Storage is great so I can tuck things in corners. I carry a rain jacket too and my own stuff as well, which is nice. The color goes well with everything, which is great. I needed a bag to carry for walks and trips to the park and this is perfect.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 산책 가방이 따로 필요할까? 고민하다가 구매했는데 구매하길 잘한 거 같아요 사이즈는 작은 거 같지만 생각보다 이것저것 물건들이 꽤 들어갑니다 가방도 별로 안 무거워서 가볍게 들고 다니기 좋아요
reviews.content_en: I was wondering if I really needed a separate walk bag, but I'm glad I bought it. The size seems small but actually holds quite a lot of things. The bag itself isn't too heavy either so it's comfortable to carry around

reviews.name: 은****
reviews.content:
분명 산책가방인데.. 안걷고 공짜로 얻어타고가려고 하네요..ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 이동가방인줄 알고 들어가길래 찍은거구요
2.7키로 치와와가 들어갈정도의 사이즈이기는 합니다
재질이 엄청 튼튼해서 오래 사용할 수 있을 것 같아요
3일동안 여러가지 중에 고민하고 구매했는데 만족합니당!
reviews.content_en:
It's supposed to be a walk bag but... my pup wants to ride for free without walking ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ I took a photo because I thought it was a carrier bag
It's big enough to fit my 2.7kg Chihuahua
The material is super durable so it should last a long time
I thought about it for 3 days among different options before buying, and I'm satisfied!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
전 생각보다 작은느낌이네요
그치만 물통수납도 되고 산책할때 편리할꺼 같네요
다른산책가방들은 많지만 물통수납이 안되어서 불편했는데 
이가방은 편할꺼 같아 맘에 드네요
reviews.content_en:
It feels smaller than I expected
But it has water bottle storage and should be convenient for walks
Other walk bags exist but they don't have water bottle storage which was inconvenient
I like this bag because it seems like it'll be convenient

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
산책가방 여기저기 알아보다가 이 가방이 가장 마음에 들어서 사게 되었어요. 쿠폰적용으로 저렴하게 샀는데 받고 나서 실물로 보니 기대보다 더 좋아서 요즘 최애가방입니다 
산책뿐만아니라 평소에 데일리로도 쓰고 있어요 
다른 가방처럼 흐물하지않고 빳빳한데다가 가벼운편에 색감도 넘 이뻐요
사실 이걸 산 가장 큰 이유는 배변봉투를 뺄 수 있는 구멍이 있어서인데 요즘 이 기능으로 산책의 질이 올라갔답니다!
reviews.content_en:
I looked at walk bags all over and chose this one because I liked it the most. I got it at a good price with a coupon and when it arrived in person, it was better than expected—it's my favorite bag these days!
I use it not just for walks but as my everyday daily bag too
Unlike other bags it's crisp and structured, lightweight, and the color is so pretty
Honestly the biggest reason I bought this was because it has a hole for pulling out poop bags—my walks have gotten so much better with this feature!

reviews.name: Y****
reviews.content: 4개월 조금 넘은 아기 비숑 견주 입니다!! 아직 산책 훈련 중이라 간식이며 이것저것 챙길게 많아서 이동가방만으론 다 챙겨가기 버거워서 역시나 믿고 쓰는 바잇미 어플로 바로 들어와서 주문 했습니당!! ㅎㅎㅎ 디자인은 물론이며 수납력도 엄청 좋습니다! :-) 바잇미와 함께 무럭무럭 자라나는 중입니다!! ㅇ감사해요 앞으로도 더 안전하고 좋은 제품들 부탁 드려요~~🥰❤️
reviews.content_en: I'm a Bichon owner with a pup just over 4 months old!! We're still in walk training so there's a lot to pack like treats and such, so a carrier bag alone wasn't enough. So I trust BITE ME and came straight to the app and ordered!! ㅎㅎㅎ The design is great of course, and the storage capacity is amazing! :-) Growing nicely with BITE ME!! Thank you so much and please keep making safe and good products going forward~~🥰❤️

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 다둥이네라 함께 산책 나갈때는 어깨끈가방이 편해서 이번 할인기회에 득템!! 넉넉한공간 편리한 주머니 만족합니다
reviews.content_en: With multiple dogs, a shoulder strap bag is more convenient when we go for walks together, so I grabbed one during this sale!! I'm satisfied with the spacious space and convenient pockets

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 사이즈 너무 괜찮고 퀄도 괜찮아요. 그러나 저는 왼쪽 어깨에 매는것을 즐겨하는 사람으로써 이 가방은 오른쪽에 어깨끈 가게 매는 사람용 입니다. 참고하세용! 사진 찍느라 오른쪽 어깨에 매었지만 적응하면 되겠죠. ㅎㅎ 1.6kg 포메도 쏙 들어가나 편해 보이지는 않지만 안에 수납도 괜찮은 편입니다 😀
reviews.content_en: The size is nice and the quality is good. However, as someone who likes to wear bags on my left shoulder, this bag is designed for people who wear it on the right shoulder. Just FYI! I wore it on my right shoulder for photos but I'll get used to it with time ㅎㅎ My 1.6kg Pomeranian fits in it but doesn't look super comfortable, though the internal storage is decent 😀

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 물통도 세울수 있고 똥츄 따로 안들고 다녀도 되고 좋아요 가방도 가볍네요 단 바닥깔판이 없는게 조금 아쉽네요
reviews.content_en: You can stand a water bottle up, and you don't need to carry a separate poop bag holder anymore which is great. The bag is light too. The only thing is the bottom doesn't have a base board which is a bit of a shame

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
산책가방넘좋아요
평소에도들고다니기도좋아요
수납공간도충분하고바닥면도튼튼해서가방모양이달라지지안아서더좋아요~^^완젼강추입니다
reviews.content_en:
I love the walk bag so much
It's great to carry around normally too
There's plenty of storage space and the bottom is sturdy so the bag shape doesn't change which is even better~^^ Definitely highly recommend!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 네이비 사길 정말 잘 했어요. 강아지가 산책가방을 더렵혀서 유색이길 원했는데 네이비가 딱이네요! 가방 사이즈도 적당하고 이뻐요.  안에 텀블러 넣는 공간이 하나 더 있음 좋을 것 같아요~ (물통&간식통)
reviews.content_en: I'm so glad I got the navy. My dog dirties the walk bag so I wanted a darker color and navy is perfect! The bag size is just right and it's pretty. It would be nice if there was one more space inside for a tumbler~ (water bottle & treat container)

reviews.name: 성****
reviews.content: 와이프가 엄청 맘에들어하네요.재질도 엄청 좋구요!역시 바잇미 믿고 살만해요!
reviews.content_en: My wife absolutely loves it. The material is really great too! BITE ME is definitely worth trusting and buying from!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 예상보다 더 큰 사이즈의 가방이였고 수납공간이 넉넉해서 물건을 많이 넣어도 공간이 남더라구요 ㅎㅎ 평소 산책할 때 아니더라도 이름처럼 데일리로 그냥 메도 될 만큼 깔끔하고 예쁜 거 같아요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: The bag was bigger than I expected and has really spacious storage, so even when I put a lot of stuff in it there's still room left over ㅎㅎ It's clean and pretty enough that you could use it as a daily bag even when you're not on a walk ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 하****
reviews.content: 산책가방 필요해서 찾고 찾다가 바잇미가 제일 편해보이고 좋아보여서 구매했는데 역시 좋은선택이었어오!! 응가봉지 들어가는 부분도 넘 좋고 안에 물병 넣는곳도 있고 적당한 사이즈의 포켓도 있어서 산책갈때 말고도 평소에도 넘 잘쓸거같은 가방이에요! 여름엔 역시 천가방이 최고죠!!깔별로 사고싶은 마음,,단종된다면 쟁여놓고싶은 가방이에요,,♡
reviews.content_en: I looked everywhere for a walk bag and BITE ME seemed the most convenient and appealing, so I bought it and it was definitely a good choice!! The poop bag slot is amazing and there's a water bottle pocket inside plus appropriately sized pockets, so it's a bag I'll use a lot even when I'm not walking!! A canvas bag is the best for summer!! I want to buy it in different colors... if it gets discontinued I want to stock up on it... ♡

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
금방 지저분해질거같아 네이비색상으로 샀는데 귀욤귀욤하네요
물티슈 바로 뺄수있는칸만 있으면 될거같아서 리폼했는데 네이비가방이라 더 어울리는거같아요
reviews.content_en: I thought it would get messy quickly, but I got it in navy and it's so cute! 😊 I modified it to have a pocket for wet wipes that's easy to pull out, and it matches even better with the navy bag.

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content: 사이즈가 적당해서 이것저것 넣어다니기에 딱~좋아요
reviews.content_en: The size is just right - perfect for carrying all sorts of things around!

reviews.name: L****
reviews.content: 와 가방이 진짜 좋다!! 예쁘고 쓰기 편해요~ 사이즈도 딱 좋은 사이즈에요. 이거 사서 너무 행복해요^^
reviews.content_en: Wow, this bag is really great!! It's pretty and so convenient to use~ The size is just perfect too. I'm so happy I bought it^^

reviews.content: 산책가방 이것저것 고민하다 가격대비 젤 깔끔해보이더라구여 역시나 받아보니 안쪽 마감도 좋고 강아지랑 외출시 너무 편하게쓰게끔 잘되어있어요 저 겨울되면 다른소재로 된것도 살래요 ㅜㅜ 바잇미 알게된후로 날마다 들락날락 하면서 구경하는 재미에 빠졌어요 제작상품 많이 내주세요!!!
reviews.content_en: I was debating between different walk bags, and this one looked the cleanest for the price. And sure enough, the inside finishing is great and it's designed perfectly for convenient use when going out with my pup! When winter comes, I'm gonna buy another one in a different material ㅜㅜ Ever since I discovered BITE ME, I check in every day out of pure fun looking at their products. Please release more custom items!!!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 가방 수납력이 정말 좋네요 구획이 나뉘어 있어서 담기도 좋아요 가방 크기도 딱 알맞고 좋아요
reviews.content_en: The storage capacity of this bag is really impressive! It has separate compartments which makes packing so easy. The size is also just perfect!

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content: 강아지 산책가방이 이렇게 예쁠 일인가요?!? 저는 평소에도 사용합니다>< 물통 나뉘어져잇는거 너무 편하구요 우리강지 똥봉투구멍도 엄청 편리해요 에코백 안에 손 집어넣고 이리저리 찾는 불편함 진짜진짜 공감했거든요ㅠ 바잇미 예쁘고 실용적인 아이템 더 많이 만들어주세요@!!💛
reviews.content_en: Can a dog walk bag really be this pretty?!? I use it all the time><  The divided water bottle section is so convenient, and the poop bag hole is incredibly practical! I totally get the frustration of shoving your hand into an eco bag and searching around for stuff ㅠ BITE ME, please make more pretty and practical items like this!@!!💛

reviews.name: 지****
reviews.content: 양쪽에 고리가 있어서 이것저것 걸기 너무 좋음  특히 앞주머니 핸드폰 넣기 딱임  수납이 너무 잘되어있어서 물통넣고 간식이것저것 넣어도 넉넉함  근데 산책 한두번 다녀왔는데 털과 먼지가 잘붙는 소재라 아쉽 ㅠ 근데도 수납력이 너무 좋아서 매일 메고 다니는중
reviews.content_en: The loops on both sides are great for hanging stuff - especially the front pocket is perfect for my phone! Storage is amazing so even with a water bottle and snacks it's still spacious. But after just one or two walks, I noticed it picks up hair and dust easily which is a shame ㅠ Still, the storage is so good that I carry it with me every day.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 산책가방 따로 필요해서 아이보리 칼라하고 고민하다가 나중에 때탈것같아서 네이비로 구입했어요.받아보니 더 예쁘네요.강아지랑 외출할때 짐이 많은데 가방 자체가 가벼워서 들고다니기에도 무겁지 않아 좋네요.디자인도 깔끔해서 산책가방인지 모를것 같아요.
reviews.content_en: I needed a separate walk bag and was torn between ivory and navy colors, but went with navy since I thought ivory would get dirty easily. When I got it, it's even prettier than I expected! My pup and I have a lot of stuff when we go out, but the bag itself is light so it's not heavy to carry. The design is also clean so you wouldn't even know it's a walk bag.

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 산책시 은근히 챙길게많은데 좋아요
reviews.content_en: There's surprisingly a lot to carry on walks, and this bag is perfect for it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
원단은 그냥 광목이고 생각했던 재질인데 중간에 자석이 기능을 전혀 못하네요 계속 벌어져서 좀 신경쓰이네요 1초도 안붙어있어요 가방에 비해 너무 작은 자석을 쓰신거 같아요 
차라리 지퍼나 똑딱이었으면 좋았겠다는 아쉬움이 있네요 ㅠ
reviews.content_en: The fabric is just canvas as I expected, but the magnet in the middle doesn't function at all. It keeps coming open which is annoying ㅠ It doesn't stay closed for even a second. I think they used a magnet that's way too small for the bag. I wish it had a zipper or snap button instead ㅠ

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 산책가방으로 몇일고민하다가 구매했어요 ㅎㅎ 아스팔트뜨거워서 애기가 안걸으려고하길래 가방에 쏘옥넣고 다녔어요 ㅎㅎ슈퍼들어갈때도 넣구 물통세우는거있어서 물안새고 좋아용,, 물칸이랑 봉투칸때문에 산거예오 ㅎㅎ가방도이쁘구 좋네용
reviews.content_en: I debated for a few days before buying this as a walk bag ㅎㅎ It was so hot on the asphalt that my pup didn't want to walk, so I just popped her in the bag and went around ㅎㅎ I also put her in when going into stores. The water bottle stand is great so water doesn't spill. I bought it mainly for the water compartment and poop bag section ㅎㅎ The bag is also pretty and great!

reviews.name: 지****
reviews.content: 아직 강아지를 분양받기 전이지만, 제가 데일리용으로 아이패드랑 잡다한거 넣고 다니기에 좋아보여서 구매했어요! 풉백 구멍이랑 물병꽂는 공간이 만들어져있는게 맘에 드네용 크기는 생각보다 큽니당
reviews.content_en: I haven't gotten my dog yet, but I liked the look of it for daily use since I can put my iPad and other things in it! I really like the poop bag hole and the water bottle holder compartment. The size is bigger than I expected!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 사이즈랑 구성이랑 다 좋은데 가방이 약간 먼지인지 상품에 뭍어있는게 아쉬웠어요.. ㅜㅜ 다만 강아지 산책가방으로 쓰는 것이니 어차피 더러워질거 같기도하고 워낙 가방이 잘나와서 쓰려구요~
reviews.content_en: The size and layout are great, but I was a bit disappointed that there was some dust or something on the bag ㅜㅜ Still, since it's for a dog walk bag it'll get dirty anyway, and the bag is so well-made that I'm going to use it~

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 아무 가방이나 산책가방으로 쓰다가 구매했는데 칸별로 나뉘어져있는게 이렇게 편리하다니 신세계입니다 그리고 똥봉투칸이 있는것도 넘 좋구요 풉백이랑 같이 다니니 산책길이 훨씬 즐거워졌어요
reviews.content_en: I used to just use any bag as a walk bag, but wow, having separate compartments is this convenient?! A whole new world! And having a poop bag compartment is awesome too. Walks are so much more fun now going out with the poop bag and everything!

reviews.name: M****
reviews.content:
너무나 잘사용하는 산책가방이이에요! 
사이즈도 알맞게 이것저것 다 담을수있어서 양손 편하게 
산책을 시킬수있는 진짜 기대이상으로 만족합니다 
바잇미 역시 최고에요! :)
reviews.content_en: I use this walk bag all the time! The size is perfect so I can fit everything in and walk hands-free. I'm so satisfied with it, way more than I expected! BITE ME is the best! :)

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 산책가방 고민하다가 여기꺼 좋다해서 샀어요~ 사이즈도 너무 크지도 작지도 않고 좋네요 물병도 잘 들어가고 무엇보다 응가봉투 칸이 있는게 맘에 들어요 편합니다ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I was debating about walk bags and heard this one was good so I got it~ The size is just right - not too big, not too small. The water bottle fits well, and I especially love that there's a poop bag compartment. So convenient ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 리뷰가 늦었네요! 너무 잘 쓰고있어요 ㅎㅎ 애기데리고 나갈때마다 들고나가요~ 사이즈는 작은게 어찌나 공간활용이 잘되는지 ㅎㅎ 역시 믿고사는 바잇미에영
reviews.content_en: I'm late with the review! But I'm using it so well ㅎㅎ I take it everywhere when I go out with my pup~ It's amazing how such a small size has such great space utilization ㅎㅎ BITE ME is trustworthy as always!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
이것은 강아지 산책가방인가 내 가방인가?
산책가방용으로 샀는데 거의 제 데일리 가방이에요 
산책갈때도 바잇미 출근할때도 바잇미 매일매일 바잇미
reviews.content_en: Is this a dog walk bag or my personal bag? I bought it for walk bag use but it's basically become my everyday bag! On walks? BITE ME. Going to work? BITE ME. Every single day? BITE ME.

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 산책갈때 편하게 가져갈게 없어서 하나 사야지했는데 마침 추석세일 하길래 주문해서 보니깐 가볍고 좋네요.  근데 짐을 많이 넣으면 안될거같아요.
reviews.content_en: I thought I should get one since I had nothing convenient to carry on walks, and the timing was perfect since there was a Chuseok sale. When I got it, it's light and great. But I don't think it would work well if you put too much stuff in it.

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content: 왜 이제야 샀나 싶고,, 진짜 산책라이프가 업그레이드 됐어요 사실 말이 산책가방이지 내 출퇴근 가방이라능 ᕕ( ᐛ )ᕗ
reviews.content_en: Why didn't I buy this sooner?? My walk life seriously upgraded 😂 I mean, it says it's a walk bag but it's basically my commute bag lol ᕕ( ᐛ )ᕗ
